panels.description: Number of items which were in the queue at the sampling time point
panels.title: Instant Queue Size

panels.description: average number of operations waiting to be serviced.
panels.title: Average Queue Size

targets.expr: max by (device) ((1 - node_filesystem_avail_bytes{ip="$ip", fstype!~"(n|root|tmp)fs.*"} / node_filesystem_size_bytes{ip="$ip", fstype!~"(n|root|tmp)fs.*"}))
max by (device) ((1 - node_filesystem_files_free{ip="$ip", fstype!~"(n|root|tmp)fs.*"} / node_filesystem_files{ip="$ip", fstype!~"(n|root|tmp)fs.*"}))

panels.description: Prediction of avail filesystem space a day later!
panels.title: Avail Space 1D Prediction
